thesis: VCP with score 84 and tight tightening contractions (3.3% final depth). Strong fundamentals (B grade, 57% EPS growth, expanding margins). All 8 Minervini criteria met. Pullback minimal (-0.58%), near pivot at 136.53, well-positioned for breakout in strong regime.

VCP score 89 with tight final contraction (11.72%). Near all-time high (-1.11% from 52w high). Strong EPS growth (41%), expanding margins. At pivot 1566.19. All criteria passed. Strong market regime supports breakout.

Near all-time high (-0.12% from 52w). VCP score 74, tight contractions (14.54% final depth). Exceptional EPS growth (81.1%), strong RS rating (98). Volume shows healthier profile vs peers. Tight pivot structure and strong fundamentals justify entry despite minimal pullback.

At all-time high (-0.35%), VCP score 51 (weaker but valid). Exceptional EPS growth (101.7%), expanding margins. RS 98 confirms sector leadership. However, VCP tightening is false (contractions not tightening), and volume drying. Lower confidence but fundamentals strong enough to warrant entry.

VCP score 64 with weak tightening (false). Volume drying and contraction depths not converging. Revenue growth near zero (3.8% YoY) despite 673% EPS spike—suspect earnings quality. Margin expansion sharp but unsustainable. Pivot at 923.69 is meaningful, but structure is loose. Wait for cleaner pullback or more conviction on revenue.

VCP score only 54 with inconsistent tightening. Pullback of -5.15% from high is meaningful, but contractions show widening volatility (15.47% → 20.01% → 16.29%), not classic VCP compression. Volume drying is concern. Fundamentals solid (37% EPS growth, 29.8% margin). Better entry setup likely after deeper pullback toward 238.84 pivot.

VCP score 57, tightening true but contractions show declining depth (4.16% → 12.12% → 12.04%), not classic compression. Pullback -3.25% from high is modest. Large-cap mega-cap (4T market cap) moves slowly. Volume drying. RS 92 is solid. Fundamentals B grade (31% EPS, 30.3% margin). Lower volatility and VCP quality warrant watching for better entry near pivot 310.92.

Near-duplicate of GOOGL with slightly lower RS (91 vs 92) and lower institutional ownership (61% vs 81%). VCP score 62 (slightly higher) but same tightening pattern weakness. Pullback -4.12% from high. Same concerns as GOOGL: mega-cap structure, modest contraction quality, volume drying. Prefer GOOGL if forced to choose.
